projects.title: New Single — DESERT COLD
projects.desc: A top-down drive through the canyons at golden hour. Full video and story premiere soon.

releases: A Christmas Special You Didn’t Know You Needed
press: Interview with actress and singer Devin Cecchetto
From a personal story to a summer track
I’m so honored to be part of The Way Home — its story is truly healing
The Way Home cast on what they would tell their younger selves
Behind the scenes with Devin Cecchetto — exploring The Way Home

timeline.title: First notes
timeline.text: Six years old and singing children’s roles in Toronto opera productions — the very beginning of a life on stage.

timeline.title: A triple threat in training
timeline.text: Growing up in Toronto’s east end, she trains in the musical-theatre program at the Etobicoke School of the Arts — then earns a degree in musical theatre.

timeline.title: First feature
timeline.text: A part in Columbia Pictures’ The Craft: Legacy, alongside the short films Photograph and Rain on Me.

timeline.title: Series regular
timeline.text: Ten episodes as Victoria Anderson in The Parker Andersons / Amelia Parker — and a first Netflix set on Ginny & Georgia.
timeline.cap: With Agape Mngomezulu in The Parker Andersons / Amelia Parker (2021)

timeline.title: Bad Influence
timeline.text: Starring as Lily Miller opposite Jennie Garth in the thriller Bad Influence.
timeline.cap: With Jennie Garth in Bad Influence (2022)

timeline.title: Leading lady — and a first single
timeline.text: Lead roles across Lifetime — Don’t Sell My Baby, Who Killed Our Father?, Marry F*** Kill — while “Phase”, her first original single, arrives with its own video.

timeline.title: The music takes off
timeline.text: Singles “OFF MY MIND!” and “Fantasy” arrive with official music videos.

timeline.title: The Way Home
timeline.text: Joining Hallmark’s The Way Home as Teenage Evelyn Goodwin — a fan-favorite role through the show’s final seasons.
timeline.cap: As Teen Evelyn in The Way Home

timeline.title: Netflix — and a Vevo of her own
timeline.text: Jess in Netflix’s Wayward; “Ships in the Night”, “So Obvious” and “Super Sonic Girl” launch her Vevo channel — plus a Christmas special EP of her very own.

timeline.title: The story continues
timeline.text: The Way Home’s final season airs — and two brand-new music videos are on the way.

bio:
Devin Cecchetto is a singer-songwriter and actress from Toronto, moving between Canada and Los Angeles.

She began singing in operas at age six, trained in musical theatre, and grew up on stages in Toronto’s east end. On screen she is known for The Way Home (Hallmark), Wayward and Ginny & Georgia (Netflix), and a string of leading roles in Lifetime features.

Her own music — dreamy, cinematic pop — brings both halves of her life together, from “Ships in the Night” and “So Obvious” to “Super Sonic Girl” and a Christmas special of her very own.
contactNote: For bookings, press, casting and collaborations — or just to say hi.
